items.question: What is AI Image Upscale?
items.answer: An AI workflow that increases image resolution and enhances quality while intelligently preserving details. Unlike basic resizing, AI upscaling adds realistic detail.

items.question: What images work best for upscaling?
items.answer: Photos, illustrations, graphics, and artwork all work well. Best results come from images that aren't extremely blurry or heavily compressed to begin with.

items.question: How much can I upscale an image?
items.answer: Typically 2x to 4x the original resolution. The exact limit depends on the source image quality and the model used.

items.question: Will upscaling fix blurry images?
items.answer: AI upscaling can enhance clarity and add detail, but it works best on images that have some inherent quality. Extremely blurry or damaged images may have limited improvement.

items.question: Can I use upscaled images for print?
items.answer: Yes. AI upscaling is commonly used to prepare digital images for print materials, posters, and large-format displays where higher resolution is needed.

items.question: How does pricing work?
items.answer: Credits are consumed based on the upscale factor and output resolution. Higher upscale factors and larger outputs use more credits.
